About Royal Taxi Services

Your Trusted Private Transfer
Partner in Barcelona

At Royal Taxi Services, we specialise in premium private rides designed for comfort, reliability, and peace of mind. With years of experience and hundreds of satisfied passengers, our goal is to make every journey smooth and stress-free.

From BCN airport arrivals to cross-border journeys into Andorra, every ride is handled with care, comfort, and a driver who knows the road inside out.

✦
Professional drivers and premium vehicles Fully licensed and background-checked chauffeurs
✦
Clear, fixed pricing with no hidden charges What you see is exactly what you pay
✦
24/7 availability across Barcelona and beyond Always ready, always on time
Learn More →

What We Do

Every Journey, Covered

✈

Airport Transfers

Barcelona El Prat airport pickups and drop-offs. We track your flight, wait for free, and meet you inside arrivals with a name board.

♡

Weddings & Events

Make your special day unforgettable. Elegant fleet, decorated on request, fully coordinated with your timeline.

🏙

City to City

Barcelona to Madrid, Valencia, Andorra, or anywhere across Spain. Long-distance in total comfort.

◈

Corporate Travel

Professional transport for business executives. Discreet, punctual, and perfectly presented every single time.

⚓

Port & Cruise Transfers

Arrive at the Port of Barcelona without stress. We handle luggage, timing, and all the details so you don't have to.

◎

Private Day Tours

Explore Montserrat, Costa Brava, Sitges, or design your own custom route. Private guide available on request.

Why Royal Taxi Services

The Difference Is in The Details

01

Always On Time

We track your flight or train in real time and adjust pickup accordingly. Never wait, never rush.

02

Fixed Prices

No surge pricing, no hidden fees, no surprises at the end of your ride.

03

Licensed Drivers

Fully licensed, background-checked, and trained to the highest professional standard.

04

Premium Fleet

Four carefully chosen vehicles for maximum comfort on every journey.

05

24/7 Support

Call or WhatsApp us any time. A real person always answers — not a bot.

06

Meet & Greet

Driver meets you inside the terminal with a name board for airport pickups.

07

Child Safety

Child and booster seats available at no extra cost — just select when booking.

08

Free Cancellation

Cancel up to 24 hours before your ride with absolutely no charge.

FAQ

Common Questions

Everything you need to know before booking your private transfer with Royal Taxi Services.

Still have a question? Contact us — we respond fast.

We recommend booking at least 24 hours in advance. For peak dates, holidays, or weddings, book as early as possible. Last-minute bookings are accepted based on availability — just call or WhatsApp us directly.
Yes — always. We monitor your flight in real time and adjust our driver's pickup time accordingly. If your flight is delayed, your driver will know before you land. No extra charge for waiting up to 60 minutes after landing.
You pay securely by card via Stripe during booking. Visa, Mastercard, and Amex are all accepted. Your card details are encrypted and never stored on our servers. Your booking is confirmed instantly after payment.
Free cancellation is available up to 24 hours before your scheduled pickup. Changes to date, time, or destination can be made at any time subject to availability. Just contact us directly.
Yes, child seats and booster seats are available at no extra charge. Simply select them when filling in the booking form and we'll have the right seat ready.
Absolutely. You can book a one-way transfer, a return on the same route, or two separate journeys at different times. Return bookings often come with a small discount.
